title: isachne polygonoides
intro: Isachne polygonoides, also known as grass of the Andes or Andean grass, is a type of perennial grass native to South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Isachne polygonoides include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Isachne polygonoides can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
